privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: AXIEL Core respects the privacy of all its users and the patients of their clinics. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, store, share and protect personal information within the AXIEL Core platform, in compliance with Brazil's General Data Protection Law (LGPD — Federal Law No. 13.709/2018) and other applicable Brazilian regulations.
privacy.s1Body: The controller of the personal data processed under this policy is the company responsible for the AXIEL Core platform (corporate name to be defined upon formal incorporation of the legal entity), headquartered in the State of São Paulo, Brazil. For any questions related to privacy and data protection, contact us at the official email address:
privacy.s2Intro: We collect different categories of data according to the type of data subject and the purpose of processing:

s2Items.title: 2.1 Health practitioner data (platform user)
s2Items.desc: Full name, email address, password (stored in encrypted form), professional registration number (CRM, CRP, CRN, CREFITO, CRFA or equivalent), specialty, billing data (CPF or CNPJ, address) and any profile information provided voluntarily.

s2Items.title: 2.2 Patient clinical data
s2Items.desc: Name, date of birth, sex, contact data (phone, email), intake, clinical progress records, diagnostic hypotheses, test results, prescriptions, treatment plans, photos and clinical documents attached by the practitioner. This data constitutes sensitive data in the health data category, under Art. 5, item II, of the LGPD.

s2Items.title: 2.3 Access and navigation data
s2Items.desc: IP address, browser type and version, operating system, pages accessed, login and logout times, logs of actions performed on the platform and performance and error data collected for system stability purposes.

s2Items.title: 2.4 Cookie data
s2Items.desc: We use strictly necessary cookies for the platform to function (session authentication, interface preferences) and anonymized analytics cookies to understand platform usage. Users can manage cookie preferences through their browser settings.

privacy.s3Intro: All data processing carried out by AXIEL Core is grounded in legal bases expressly provided in the LGPD:

s3Items.label: Art. 7, V — performance of a contract
s3Items.desc: Processing of practitioner data necessary to provide the contracted services, including account creation and maintenance, subscription processing and operational communications.

s3Items.label: Art. 7, IX — legitimate interest
s3Items.desc: Collection of access logs, security data, fraud prevention and continuous improvement of the platform, provided it does not harm the data subject's fundamental interests.

s3Items.label: Art. 7, VI — regular exercise of rights
s3Items.desc: Data retention to comply with legal and regulatory obligations, especially in tax and healthcare areas.

s3Items.label: Art. 11, II, f — provision of health services
s3Items.desc: Processing of patients' sensitive health data to enable the practitioner to carry out their clinical activities through the platform.

s3Items.label: Art. 11, I — consent
s3Items.desc: When the patient accesses the Patient Portal and provides data directly to the platform, processing is carried out based on their free, informed and unequivocal consent.

privacy.s4Intro: Personal data is processed exclusively for the following purposes:
s4Items: Creation, maintenance and authentication of user accounts on the platform;
Operation of features: scheduling, electronic records, automatic communications, finance and reports;
Processing payments and issuing charges related to the plan subscription;
Sending transactional notifications (booking confirmations, reminders, system updates);
Generation of clinical insights via artificial intelligence, exclusively from the patient's own data and for use by the responsible practitioner;
Security monitoring, detection of unauthorized access and fraud prevention;
Continuous improvement of services through aggregated and anonymized data;
Compliance with legal, regulatory and contractual obligations.
privacy.s5Intro: AXIEL Core never sells, rents or transfers personal data to third parties for commercial purposes. Sharing occurs exclusively with the following technical providers, as data processors, who act under contract and in compliance with the LGPD:

s5Items.name: Supabase / AWS
s5Items.desc: Database infrastructure and cloud storage. All data is stored with encryption at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.2+).

s5Items.name: Stripe
s5Items.desc: Payment processing and subscription management. Credit card data never passes through AXIEL Core servers — processed directly by Stripe with PCI-DSS certification.

s5Items.name: Resend
s5Items.desc: Sending transactional emails (confirmations, reminders, notifications). Only the recipient's email address and the content needed for the communication are transmitted.

s5Items.name: Twilio
s5Items.desc: Sending SMS messages and WhatsApp communications. The phone number and message content are shared exclusively to enable delivery of the communication.

privacy.s5Outro: In addition to the providers above, we may share data when required by law, court order or competent authority, or to protect the rights, property or safety of AXIEL Core, its users or third parties.
privacy.s6Body: Some of our technical providers have infrastructure in foreign territory. All international transfer of personal data is carried out in compliance with Art. 33 of the LGPD, through the adoption of standard contractual clauses or confirmation that the destination country offers an adequate level of protection. Currently, data may be processed on servers located in the United States and the European Union, both with adequacy mechanisms recognized by the ANPD and specialized doctrine.
privacy.s7Intro: Personal data is retained for the time necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy, observing the following criteria:

s7Items.title: Active account
s7Items.desc: Data is kept throughout the term of the service contract.

s7Items.title: After account closure
s7Items.desc: Data is retained for up to 5 (five) years to comply with legal obligations in tax (Decree No. 9.580/2018), social security and health areas (CFM Resolution No. 1.821/2007 and equivalent rules).

s7Items.title: Access logs
s7Items.desc: Retained for 6 (six) months, under Art. 15 of the Brazilian Internet Civil Framework (Law No. 12.965/2014).

s7Items.title: Anonymized data
s7Items.desc: May be retained indefinitely for business intelligence and product improvement, since it does not allow identification of the data subject.

privacy.s8Intro: The data subject has the following rights, which may be exercised at any time by request to our Officer at the address

s8Items.title: Confirmation and access
s8Items.desc: Confirm the existence of processing and access the personal data held by AXIEL Core.

s8Items.title: Correction
s8Items.desc: Request the correction of incomplete, inaccurate or outdated data.

s8Items.title: Anonymization, blocking or deletion
s8Items.desc: Request the anonymization of unnecessary or excessive data, the blocking of processing or the deletion of data, except where retention is required by law.

s8Items.title: Portability
s8Items.desc: Receive the data in a structured and interoperable format for transfer to another service provider.

s8Items.title: Information on sharing
s8Items.desc: Obtain information about which public and private entities the data has been shared with.

s8Items.title: Withdrawal of consent
s8Items.desc: When processing is based on consent, withdraw it at any time, without prejudice to the lawfulness of previous processing.

s8Items.title: Objection
s8Items.desc: Object to processing carried out on legal bases other than consent, in case of non-compliance with this policy.

s8Items.title: Review of automated decisions
s8Items.desc: Request the review of decisions made solely on the basis of automated processing of personal data that affect your interests.

s8Items.title: Petition the ANPD
s8Items.desc: File a petition with the National Data Protection Authority (ANPD) regarding your data.

privacy.s8Outro: We will respond to all requests within 15 (fifteen) calendar days, and this period may be extended for an equal period, duly justified, under ANPD regulations.
privacy.s9Intro: We adopt appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data against unauthorized access, loss, destruction, alteration or improper disclosure:
s9Items: Encryption in transit via TLS 1.2 or higher in all communications between client and server;
Encryption at rest (AES-256) for all data stored in the database and file storage service;
Row-Level Security (RLS) ensuring each practitioner accesses only their own patients' data;
Secure authentication with support for multi-factor authentication (MFA) and session tokens with controlled expiration;
Audit logs recording all relevant actions performed on the platform;
Internal access control based on the principle of least privilege, restricting AXIEL Core staff access to strictly necessary data;
Regular security testing and vulnerability review;
Incident response procedure with notification to the ANPD and affected data subjects within the legal timeframe.
privacy.s10Body: The health practitioner using the platform is the controller of their patients' personal data, with AXIEL Core acting as data processor, under Art. 5, item VII, of the LGPD. In this capacity, the practitioner is responsible for: (i) obtaining adequate consent from patients for the collection and processing of their clinical data; (ii) ensuring the accuracy and updating of the information entered; (iii) observing the ethical duties and rules of the respective professional councils (CFM, CFP, CRN, CREFITO and others); and (iv) informing their patients of the existence of this Privacy Policy when applicable. AXIEL Core provides the practitioner with all the technical tools necessary to fulfill these obligations.
privacy.s11Body: The AXIEL Core platform uses artificial intelligence resources to generate clinical insights, progress suggestions and session summaries. These resources process the patient's clinical data exclusively to support the work of the responsible health practitioner, and never to make diagnostic or therapeutic decisions autonomously. No data is used to train third-party artificial intelligence models without prior anonymization and explicit consent. The data subject has the right to request the review of any automated processing that affects them, as described in Section 8.
privacy.s12Body: The Patient Portal is an environment provided to the practitioner so that their patients can view treatment follow-up information. When the patient accesses the Portal, their access data (name, email, preferences) is collected based on their explicit consent. The patient may, at any time, request the revocation of access to the Portal directly from the practitioner responsible for their care. The content displayed in the Portal is the sole responsibility of the practitioner who configures it.
privacy.s13Body: The AXIEL Core platform is intended exclusively for health practitioners over 18 (eighteen) years of age. Personal data of children and adolescents may be entered into the platform by the practitioner responsible for their care, such as pediatric patient data. In these cases, processing must observe Art. 14 of the LGPD and the rules of the Child and Adolescent Statute (ECA — Law No. 8.069/1990), and it is the practitioner's responsibility to obtain consent from parents or legal guardians when required.
privacy.s14Body: In the event of a security incident that may result in significant risk or harm to data subjects, AXIEL Core will notify the ANPD and affected data subjects within the timeframe established by current regulations. The notification will contain: (i) a description of the nature of the affected data; (ii) information about the data subjects involved; (iii) an indication of the technical and security measures used; (iv) risks related to the incident; and (v) measures that have been or will be adopted to reverse or mitigate the effects of the incident.
privacy.s15Body: Under Art. 41 of the LGPD, AXIEL Core has appointed a Data Protection Officer (DPO), responsible for acting as a communication channel between the company, data subjects and the National Data Protection Authority (ANPD). The Officer can be contacted at the email address:
privacy.s16Body: This Privacy Policy may be updated periodically to reflect changes in data processing practices, new platform features or legislative changes. We will notify users of material changes by email and by a prominent notice on the platform, at least 15 (fifteen) days before they take effect. Continued use of the platform after the effective date of the new terms will constitute acceptance of the changes. Previous versions of this policy will be kept on file and made available upon request.
privacy.s17Body: This Privacy Policy is governed by the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil, in particular Law No. 13.709/2018 (LGPD), the Internet Civil Framework (Law No. 12.965/2014) and the Consumer Protection Code (Law No. 8.078/1990). To settle any disputes arising from this policy, the courts of the District of São Paulo, State of São Paulo, are elected, with express waiver of any other, however privileged.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: These Terms of Use govern access to and use of the AXIEL Core platform ("Platform"), provided by the company responsible for AXIEL Core ("AXIEL Core", "we" or "our"). By creating an account or using any feature of the Platform, you ("User" or "Practitioner") declare that you have read, understood and fully agreed to these Terms. If you do not agree with any provision, do not use the Platform.
terms.s1Title: 1. Purpose and Description of the Platform
terms.s1Body: AXIEL Core is a software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform for integrative health practitioners and clinics, built to centralize clinical management in a single digital environment. The Platform offers the following main features, which may vary by plan: smart scheduling with automatic reminders, electronic records (intake, clinical progress, prescriptions, tests and documents), financial management, patient relationship automations via WhatsApp and email, patient portal with a personalized link, reports and clinical indicators, and AI-generated insights to support clinical work. AXIEL Core reserves the right to add, modify or discontinue features with prior notice to users.
terms.s2P1: Use of the Platform is permitted exclusively to health practitioners with active registration in a competent Brazilian professional council, including without limitation: Federal Council of Medicine (CFM), Federal Council of Psychology (CFP), Federal Council of Nutritionists (CFN), Federal Council of Physiotherapy and Occupational Therapy (COFFITO), Federal Council of Speech Therapy (CFFa), Federal Council of Nursing (COFEN) and other equivalent councils. It is also permitted to clinics, wellness spaces and duly constituted health establishments, represented by a qualified technical officer.
terms.s2P2: To create an account, the User must provide truthful, complete and up-to-date information, including full name, valid email address and professional registration number. The User is fully responsible for the accuracy of the registered information and for maintaining the confidentiality of their access credentials.
terms.s2P3: Registration of minors under 18 (eighteen) years of age as Platform users is prohibited. AXIEL Core reserves the right to verify the validity of the professional registrations provided and to suspend or cancel accounts that do not meet the eligibility criteria.
terms.s3Intro: The Platform is offered in the following subscription plans:

s3Plans.name: Starter
s3Plans.desc: For independent practitioners starting out. Includes essential scheduling, records and patient communication features.

s3Plans.name: Professional
s3Plans.desc: For practitioners with a higher volume of appointments. Includes everything in Starter plus advanced automations, AI insights, patient portal and financial reports.

s3Plans.name: Enterprise
s3Plans.desc: For clinics and multi-practitioner teams. Includes everything in Professional plus multi-user, customizations, dedicated integrations and priority support.

terms.s3P1: All new users get access to a 14 (fourteen) day free trial with full access to the Professional plan, with no credit card required. After the trial period ends, the User must subscribe to one of the paid plans to continue using the Platform.
terms.s3P2: Subscriptions are billed monthly in advance. Payment processing is carried out exclusively by Stripe. AXIEL Core reserves the right to adjust plan prices with at least 30 (thirty) days' notice to the User. Continued use of the Platform after the new price takes effect will constitute acceptance of the adjustment.
terms.s3P3: In case of non-payment, access to the Platform may be suspended after 5 (five) calendar days of delay, and restored after payment is settled. There is no prorated refund in case of cancellation before the end of the current billing period.
terms.s4Intro: The User is solely and exclusively responsible for:
s4Items: Keeping their login and password confidential, not sharing them with third parties;
All actions performed on the Platform from their access credentials;
Immediately notifying AXIEL Core at suporte@axielcore.com in case of unauthorized access or suspected credential compromise;
Ensuring that the data entered on the Platform is truthful, accurate and obtained legally and ethically;
Keeping their registration and contact data up to date.
terms.s4Outro: AXIEL Core will not be responsible for losses arising from unauthorized use of the User's account when the User does not report the situation in a timely manner.
terms.s5P1: The 14 (fourteen) day free trial is offered once per CPF or CNPJ, upon first registration. During the trial, the User has full access to the Professional plan features, except for operational technical restrictions.
terms.s5P2: At the end of the trial period, if the User does not subscribe to a paid plan, access to the Platform will be automatically suspended and the data is retained for 30 (thirty) days for possible reactivation. After this period, the data may be permanently deleted, except for legal retention obligations. AXIEL Core does not offer trial extensions without express authorization.
terms.s6Intro: The User agrees to use the Platform exclusively for lawful, ethical purposes and in accordance with these Terms. The following are expressly prohibited:
s6Items: Using AI-generated insights and suggestions as a definitive medical, psychological or nutritional diagnosis — such resources are solely to support the practitioner's clinical judgment;
Entering patient data without their consent or without proper legal authorization;
Using the Platform for purposes that violate professional ethics or the rules of the respective professional councils;
Reverse engineering, decompiling or attempting to extract the Platform's source code;
Using automated means (bots, scrapers, crawlers) to access or collect Platform data without express authorization;
Sharing or reselling access to the Platform to third parties;
Entering illegal, defamatory, discriminatory content or content that violates third-party rights;
Using the Platform in a way that compromises its security, availability or performance for other users.
terms.s6Outro: Violation of any of the provisions above may result in immediate suspension or cancellation of the account, with no right to a refund, in addition to civil and criminal liability in the applicable spheres.
terms.s7Intro: AXIEL Core uses large language models (LLMs) to provide features such as session summary generation, clinical insights, audio transcription and progress suggestions. The User acknowledges and agrees that:
s7Items: AI-generated outputs are suggestions to support clinical work and do not replace the judgment, assessment or responsibility of the health practitioner;
AXIEL Core does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness or clinical adequacy of AI-generated content;
The practitioner is fully responsible for reviewing, validating and making decisions based on the generated outputs;
Using AI insights to solely support diagnostic or therapeutic decisions, without professional supervision, is expressly prohibited and constitutes misuse of the Platform;
AXIEL Core is not liable for damages arising from improper use or incorrect interpretation of AI-generated content.
terms.s8P1: The User, as a health practitioner, is the controller of the personal data of their patients entered into the Platform, under the General Data Protection Law (LGPD — Law No. 13.709/2018). AXIEL Core acts as data processor, processing information solely according to the User's instructions and for the purposes described in the Privacy Policy.
s8Items: Obtaining adequate consent from patients for the collection, storage and processing of their clinical data on the Platform;
Informing patients of the existence and content of AXIEL Core's Privacy Policy;
Ensuring the accuracy and lawfulness of the data entered;
Complying with professional confidentiality and ethics obligations under the rules of the competent professional councils;
Exercising patients' right to data portability, when requested, through the tools provided on the Platform.
terms.s8Outro: For more information about how we handle personal data, see our Privacy Policy.
terms.s9Intro: AXIEL Core makes commercially reasonable efforts to keep the Platform available 24 (twenty-four) hours a day, 7 (seven) days a week. However, AXIEL Core does not guarantee 100% uninterrupted availability, and the User acknowledges that the Platform may be temporarily unavailable for reasons that include:
s9Items: Scheduled preventive maintenance, communicated to the User at least 48 (forty-eight) hours in advance by email and/or notice on the Platform;
Failures in third-party infrastructure (cloud providers, telecommunications networks);
Force majeure or fortuitous events (natural disasters, large-scale cyberattacks, power failures);
Emergency security updates, which may be carried out without prior notice.
terms.s9Outro: In cases of prolonged and unjustified unavailability exceeding 72 (seventy-two) consecutive hours, the User may request a credit proportional to the interruption time, at AXIEL Core's discretion, by opening a support ticket.
terms.s10P1: All intellectual property rights related to the AXIEL Core Platform, including software, source code, design, interface, logos, trademarks, texts, methodologies and documentation, are the exclusive property of AXIEL Core or its licensors, and are protected by the Industrial Property Law (Law No. 9.279/1996), the Copyright Law (Law No. 9.610/1998) and other applicable legal instruments.
terms.s10P2: Contracting the services grants the User a limited, non-transferable, non-exclusive and revocable license to access and use the Platform strictly within the limits established in these Terms. This license does not include the right to reproduce, distribute, modify, create derivative works, sublicense, sell or commercially exploit any component of the Platform.
terms.s10P3: The data entered by the User into the Platform (including records, progress notes and clinical documents) remains the property of the User. AXIEL Core does not claim ownership over the clinical data of registered patients.
terms.s11Intro: The User is fully responsible for ensuring that their use of the Platform complies with the ethical and regulatory standards of their respective professional councils, including without limitation:
s11Items: CFM resolutions on electronic records, telemedicine and AI use (including CFM Resolution No. 1.821/2007 and subsequent ones);
CFP resolutions on online care and clinical records;
CFN rules on documentation and professional conduct;
Rules of COFFITO, CFFa, COFEN and other competent councils;
Applicable health legislation, including ANVISA rules on electronic records and telemedicine.
terms.s11Outro: AXIEL Core is not liable for irregularities in the User's professional practice arising from non-compliance with the rules above.
terms.s12Intro: AXIEL Core offers technical support to paid-plan users through the following channels:
s12Items: Email: suporte@axielcore.com (response within 1 business day on Starter and Professional plans);
In-Platform chat available on Professional and Enterprise plans, during business hours Monday to Friday, 9am to 6pm Brasília time;
Dedicated priority support for the Enterprise plan, as agreed in the contract.
terms.s12Outro: Support covers exclusively technical questions related to use of the Platform. Legal, tax or professional ethics questions are not part of AXIEL Core's support scope.
terms.s13P1: The User can cancel their subscription at any time through the account settings on the Platform or by contacting support. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period, without prejudice to access until that date. There is no termination penalty for cancellations made through this process.
terms.s13P2: AXIEL Core may cancel or suspend the User's account, with or without prior notice, in the following situations:
s13Items: Violation of any clause of these Terms of Use;
Use of the Platform for illegal, unethical purposes or that harm third parties;
Non-payment for a period exceeding 30 (thirty) days after notice;
Provision of false information at registration, including inactive or invalid professional registration;
terms.s13Outro: After cancellation — whether by the User or by AXIEL Core — the User will have 30 (thirty) days to export their data. After this period, data will be retained in accordance with the Privacy Policy and applicable legal obligations.
terms.s14Intro: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable Brazilian law, AXIEL Core will not be liable for:
s14Items: Indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages, including loss of revenue, loss of data, loss of business opportunities or reputational harm;
Damages arising from unauthorized access to the User's account caused by the User's own negligence;
Clinical, diagnostic or therapeutic decisions made by the User based on the data managed on the Platform;
Service interruptions caused by third parties (cloud providers, telecommunications carriers, AI providers);
Damages arising from improper use of the Platform in breach of these Terms.
terms.s14Outro: In any case, AXIEL Core's total liability to the User is limited to the total amount paid by the User to AXIEL Core in the 3 (three) months immediately preceding the event that gave rise to the claim.
terms.s15Body: The User agrees to indemnify, defend and hold harmless AXIEL Core, its directors, employees, agents and partners from any claims, liabilities, damages, losses and expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising from: (i) the User's breach of these Terms; (ii) improper use of the Platform; (iii) violation of third-party rights, including privacy or intellectual property rights; (iv) content entered by the User into the Platform; or (v) non-compliance with ethical or regulatory standards of the User's profession.
terms.s16Body: AXIEL Core reserves the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Material changes will be communicated to the User by email and by a prominent notice on the Platform at least 15 (fifteen) days before they take effect. Non-material changes (grammatical corrections, formatting adjustments, contact updates) may be made without prior notice. Continued use of the Platform after the effective date of the new terms will constitute acceptance of the revised Terms. If the User does not agree with the changes, they may cancel their account as described in Section 13.
terms.s17Body: These Terms of Use are governed by and interpreted in accordance with the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil, in particular Law No. 10.406/2002 (Civil Code), Law No. 8.078/1990 (Consumer Protection Code), Law No. 12.965/2014 (Internet Civil Framework) and Law No. 13.709/2018 (LGPD). The parties elect the courts of the District of São Paulo, State of São Paulo, to settle any disputes arising from these Terms, with express waiver of any other, however privileged. Before resorting to the courts, the parties undertake to attempt an amicable resolution of the dispute for a minimum period of 30 (thirty) days.
terms.ctaBody: Contact us at <mail>contato@axielcore.com</mail> or visit our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
